ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT
COMPARE AND/OR CERTIFY COPY OF ANY RECORD ON FILE FOR FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOHAMMED, ODAY SHAMS
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MOHAMMED, ODAY SHAMS AS TO DEFENDANT SHAPIRO, WILLIAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-1996 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOHAMMED, ODAY SHAMS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAPIRO, WILLIAM $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,040.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
